message:
fix: don't TrimSpace git status --porcelain lines in isBeadsOnlyChanges (gt-7j2zb)

TrimSpace stripped the leading space from working-tree-only changes
(e.g., " M .beads/foo"), shifting the filename extraction by one
character and causing HasPrefix(".beads/") to fail. Parse raw
porcelain output directly: skip lines shorter than 4 chars, extract
filename from column 3 onward.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
